properties.displayName: Crypto Mining Activity Detected in Azure
properties.description: Detects indicators of cryptocurrency mining on Azure VMs including known mining pool connections, high CPU usage spikes reported in metrics, suspicious process names in Syslog, or large outbound connections to mining pool ports (3333, 4444, 5555, 7777, 14433). MITRE ATT&CK: T1496 - Resource Hijacking.
properties.query:
let miningPools = dynamic([
    "pool.minexmr.com", "xmrpool.eu", "supportxmr.com",
    "nanopool.org", "2miners.com", "f2pool.com",
    "antpool.com", "btc.com", "slushpool.com",
    "nicehash.com", "miningpoolhub.com",
    "ethermine.org", "flexpool.io"
]);
let miningProcesses = dynamic([
    "xmrig", "cgminer", "bfgminer", "cpuminer",
    "minerd", "ethminer", "t-rex", "nbminer",
    "lolminer", "gminer", "teamredminer", "phoenixminer"
]);
let miningPorts = dynamic([3333, 4444, 5555, 7777, 14433, 45700, 9999, 14444]);
// DNS queries to known mining pools
let dnsHits = DnsEvents
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where Name has_any (miningPools)
    | extend ThreatVector = "DNS_MINING_POOL", HostName = Computer
    | project TimeGenerated, HostName, ThreatVector, Detail = Name;
// Syslog process matches
let syslogHits = Syslog
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where ProcessName has_any (miningProcesses)
        or SyslogMessage has_any (miningProcesses)
    | extend ThreatVector = "PROCESS_MINING", HostName = HostName
    | project TimeGenerated, HostName, ThreatVector, Detail = ProcessName;
// Network connections to mining ports
let networkHits = AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where DestPort_d in (miningPorts)
    | where FlowDirection_s =~ "O"
    | extend ThreatVector = "NETWORK_MINING_PORT", HostName = VM1Name_s
    | project TimeGenerated, HostName, ThreatVector, Detail = tostring(DestPort_d);
union dnsHits, syslogHits, networkHits
| summarize
    ThreatVectors  = make_set(ThreatVector),
    ThreatDetails  = make_set(Detail),
    HitCount       = count(),
    FirstSeen      = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen       = max(TimeGenerated)
    by HostName
| where HitCount >= 1
| extend
    ConfidenceScore = array_length(ThreatVectors) * 30 + HitCount * 5,
    Confidence = case(
        array_length(ThreatVectors) >= 3, "HIGH",
        array_length(ThreatVectors) == 2, "MEDIUM",
        "LOW"
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated = FirstSeen,
    HostName,
    Confidence,
    ConfidenceScore,
    ThreatVectors,
    ThreatDetails,
    HitCount,
    FirstSeen,
    LastSeen
| sort by ConfidenceScore desc
